news.headline: HDI's report shows 59% prioritize enhancing Customer Experience in ITSM projects.
news.summary: In San Francisco, HDI, an organization focused on enhancing service and support within businesses, has launched the "The State of Service Management in 2024" report. This report delves into artificial intelligence (AI), enterprise service management, and striving for excellence in customer experience (CX). A significant finding reveals that 59% of participants indicate that the primary motivation for IT Service Management (ITSM) initiatives is enhancing CX, positioning it as a paramount concern in leveraging services.

news.headline: NFT sales skyrocket in December, with $92M weekly sales on Ethereum. Magic Eden faces issues with token launch.
news.summary: Over the course of a week, transactions within the Ethereum blockchain resulted in a significant $92 million in sales of non-fungible tokens (NFTs). This surge in activity was fueled by the growing popularity of collections such as CryptoPunks and Pudgy Penguins among buyers and sellers.

news.headline: US November receipts, outlays and deficit are all record highs for that month - Treasury Official.
University of Portland receives $20M gift, among largest in history, to enhance student access and academic excellence.
news.summary: The University of Portland in Oregon has received a significant $20 million donation, marking one of the largest in the institution's history. The generous gift comes from a family with over 65 years of connection to the university. The donation aims to bolster student access, academic quality, and student development initiatives. The donors, opting to stay unnamed, emphasized their desire to keep the spotlight on the impactful initiatives being supported.

news.headline: Global emergency food market to grow by USD 3.20 billion (2024-2028), driven by AI and organized retail growth.
news.summary: On December 11, 2024, a report driven by AI revealed significant insights into the global emergency food market. It is projected to increase by USD 3.20 billion between 2024 and 2028, with an anticipated compound annual growth rate (CAGR) of 7.35% during this period. This growth indicates a promising evolution within the market landscape.

news.headline: Avon Company introduces updated commission structure for Avon Ambassadors to boost earnings potential in North America.
news.summary: Avon, a top direct seller of beauty products in North America, has revealed a revamped commission structure for Avon Ambassadors. This change aims to boost earnings for representatives, offering them greater and quicker income opportunities. The new program signifies an exciting transformation for Avon, promising improved financial prospects for its Ambassadors.

news.headline: Inventor from Woodland Hills, Calif. creates PROTECTALEG device for leg protection in bed after wife's knee surgery.
news.summary: In Pittsburgh on December 11, 2024, an inventor from Woodland Hills, California, shared his inspiration for creating a new device. After his wife underwent knee surgery, he wanted to alleviate the discomfort caused by sheets while in bed. This led him to develop the PROTECTALEG, a product aimed at safeguarding the leg during rest. The inventor's design effectively eliminates the pain and pressure typically experienced in such situations.

news.headline: US Federal Budget Balance Actual -366.76B (Forecast -356B, Previous -257.00B)
McCourt Partners and HN Capital Partners launch Hi Line Square in Dallas Design District, a transformative mixed-use project.
news.summary: In December 11, 2024, following the acquisition of one of the largest portfolios in the Design District in 2022, partners have initiated the next phase of revitalizing the neighborhood. This transformative mixed-use project aims to establish a new benchmark for design, hospitality, and the urban lifestyle in Dallas. Stay tuned as this project unfolds to shape the Design District's landscape and offer a unique experience for locals and visitors alike.

news.headline: US fiscal 2025 year-to-date deficit $624 bln vs comparable fiscal 2024 deficit $381 bln.
JLL Income Property Trust buys Minneapolis Distribution Center; has $6.6 billion in portfolio investments.
news.summary: On December 11, 2024, JLL Income Property Trust, a daily NAV REIT managed by institutions, revealed the purchase of Minneapolis Distribution. The REIT, traded on NASDAQ under symbols ZIPTAX, ZIPTMX, ZIPIAX, and ZIPIMX, possesses around $6.6 billion in investments comprising both equity and debt.

news.headline: NJ's Merrill Creek Reservoir wins Governor's Environmental Excellence Award for 'Healthy Ecosystems and Habitats'. 2,700-acre water supply area.
news.summary: A site in Holmdel, New Jersey, has been acknowledged by the New Jersey Department of Environmental Protection for its 'Healthy Ecosystems and Habitats'. The Merrill Creek Reservoir (MCR), spanning 2,700 acres, serves as both a water supply and environmental reserve. It is co-owned by Jersey Central Power & Light electric company, a subsidiary of FirstEnergy. This recognition signifies the importance of preserving the 2,700-acre site for its vital role in maintaining healthy ecosystems and habitats in the region.

news.headline: Nasdaq 100 hits record high, "Magnificent 7" market cap exceeds $17 trillion, Bitcoin hits $100k amid bullish market. Fed rate cut expectations drive optimism, tech stocks soar.
news.summary: A recent inflation report in November led to a surge in bullish momentum in the markets. Traders are now anticipating a 25-basis-point rate cut at the upcoming Federal Reserve meeting, boosting hopes for a more accommodating monetary policy. The Consumer Price Index showed a 2.7% year-over-year increase in November, meeting expectations. Core inflation, excluding volatile items, held steady at 3.3%. The Nasdaq 100 saw a significant 1.7% rally, hitting a new record high due to strong performances from major tech stocks - the "Magnificent Seven." The Roundhill Magnificent Seven ETF (NASDAQ:MAGS) also performed well, jumping 2.6% for its best showing since Nov. 6, eyeing its eighth positive session in nine trading days. Six out of the seven mega-cap tech companies achieved record highs, leading to a combined market cap reaching a considerable figure.

news.headline: SS Innovations completes BDO audit process, updates on NASDAQ uplisting plans.
news.summary: SS Innovations has successfully completed the BDO audit process, meeting all necessary requirements. The company has also provided an update on their plans for NASDAQ uplisting. Currently, they are focusing on meeting the minimum share price requirement of $4 and the minimum number of shareholders at 300. Once these criteria are met, SS Innovations will proceed with the uplisting process. This development marks a significant step forward for the company's growth and expansion opportunities.

news.headline: Billtrust recognized as Leader in IDC MarketScape for Worldwide Embedded Payment Applications 2024-2025.
news.summary: In Hamilton Township, New Jersey, on December 11, 2024, Billtrust, a prominent player in the B2B order-to-cash and digital payments sector, has been recognized as a Leader in the IDC MarketScape: Embedded Payments Applications 2024 Vendor Assessment. This report, identified as doc #US51793524 and released in December 2024, featured Billtrust among the top 20 contenders evaluated in the assessment.

news.headline: Openings of several boutique hotels in the Outer Banks of North Carolina boost lodging options, reflecting recent growth trends.
news.summary: In Manteo, North Carolina, on December 11, 2024, it was reported that the Outer Banks region is expanding its lodging options by introducing multiple unique boutique hotels over the past year. This growth is part of a larger trend involving rebranding, refurbishments, and fresh developments in the area.

news.headline: Toll Brothers introduces Skyway Landing, new luxury townhome community in Sanford, FL, opening for sale in early 2025.
news.summary: In Sanford, Florida, Toll Brothers, Inc. revealed their latest project, Skyway Landing, set to open for sale in early 2025. This upscale community will offer new townhomes with premium features and on-site amenities. Known for being the top builder of luxury homes in the nation, Toll Brothers, Inc. aims to create a gated, low-maintenance neighborhood at their Skyway Landing location on Skyway Drive. This unveiling marks a significant development for the company as they venture into this new community in Sanford.

news.headline: Equipifi partners with Synergent to offer BNPL to credit unions using Jack Henry's Symitar core processing platform, enhancing member experience.
news.summary: On December 11, 2024, in Scottsdale, Arizona, equipifi®, the top Buy Now, Pay Later (BNPL) platform for financial institutions, revealed that credit unions utilizing Synergent to connect to Jack Henry's Symitar core processing platform now have the capability to effortlessly introduce BNPL services. This will help enhance the member experience provided by these credit unions.

news.headline: California DPR removes bee statement from OxiDate 5.0 label amendment by BioSafe Systems; Important date: Dec. 11, 2024.
news.summary: In a recent update from BioSafe Systems LLC based in East Hartford, Connecticut on December 11, 2024, it was disclosed that the California Department of Pesticide Regulation (DPR) has approved a label revision for OxiDate 5.0. The revision involved the elimination of the statement regarding toxicity to bees from the Environmental Hazards section. This amendment reflects a significant development for the product's usage in California, indicating a positive shift in its environmental impact.

news.headline: Saudi Tourism Authority prepares to welcome the world for FIFA World Cup™ 2034 as host country, using 'Welcome to Arabia' brand.
news.summary: Saudi Arabia has been chosen as the host country for the FIFA World Cup™ 2034, as announced on 11 December 2024. Saudi, Welcome to Arabia, the official destination brand of the Saudi Tourism Authority (STA), is excited to welcome football fans from around the world. The STA is working diligently to prepare for the event, which is expected to bring a significant influx of visitors to the country. This announcement marks a major milestone for Saudi Arabia as it gears up to showcase its hospitality and culture on a global stage.

news.headline: Golden 1 Credit Union offers scholarships to CA students for 2025, awarding up to $500,000; applications open till January.
news.summary: Golden 1 Credit Union in Sacramento, California, has launched its 2025 Scholarship Program, now accepting applications until January 2025. This program is open to eligible California students who excel academically and are actively involved in their communities, work, and extracurricular activities. Golden 1 is dedicating up to $500,000 towards scholarships for deserving students. The credit union's initiative aims to support numerous individuals pursuing higher education.

news.headline: Inventor from LA creates Trash Lid Saver kit to seal can lids, preventing pests. (LOS-217)
news.summary: In Pittsburgh on December 11, 2024, an inventor from Los Angeles, California, shared the creation of THE TRASH LID SAVER. This innovative kit aims to securely seal trash/recycling can lids. The inventor explained the motivation behind this invention, emphasizing its ability to keep out rain, rodents, flies, and other pests. The product addresses a common issue faced by households and urban areas, with a focus on practicality and effectiveness.

news.headline: Google stock hits record high after CEO unveils Gemini 2.0 AI tool, marking it as their most capable model yet.
news.summary: The stock of Google surged to a record high after CEO Sundar Pichai introduced Gemini 2.0, labeling it as the company's most advanced AI model to date. Pichai emphasized that Gemini 2.0 is tailored for the "Agentic Era," propelling Google to new heights.

news.headline: Tesla stock reaches new high at $414.50 fueled by FSD and Trump optimism.
news.summary: On Wednesday, Tesla's stock reached a new all-time high, exceeding $414.50 per share. This surge was attributed to growing optimism surrounding Tesla's Full Self-Driving technology and positive sentiments related to the Trump administration. The company's stocks have been performing well amidst this backdrop, demonstrating strong investor confidence.

news.headline: Bitcoin's price crosses $100,000 after funding reset and Coinbase premium revival, driven by improved spot demand.
news.summary: Bitcoin's recent surge above $100,000 can be attributed to a much-needed reset in the funding rate and renewed interest in spot bids. These factors have contributed to the significant increase in the value of Bitcoin, providing a strong foundation for its continued upward momentum. This surge highlights the market's resilience and growing appeal to investors, with Bitcoin now positioned as a leading asset choice, attracting attention due to its current market performance.

news.headline: Dogecoin sees a 10% rally in a single day, sparking bullish predictions on social media. DOGE is back stronger than before.
news.summary: Dogecoin (CRYPTO: DOGE) recently surged 10% in a 24-hour period, prompting optimistic forecasts on social networks. The cryptocurrency trader Scofield expressed that DOGE is experiencing a resurgence, reinforced with a tweet stating "$DOGE Is backStronger than before🚀." Additionally, Daan Crypto Trades noted that DOGE is currently being traded at levels not seen before. The full details can be found on Benzinga.com.

news.headline: Fintech Abu Dhabi's eighth edition consolidates status, highlighting as Middle East's largest fintech festival. Hub for financial innovation. #ADFW #AbuDhabi #Fintech
news.summary: The eighth edition of Fintech Abu Dhabi recently took place in Abu Dhabi, UAE, on December 11, 2024. This event, which is part of Abu Dhabi Finance Week (ADFW) hosted by ADGM, established itself as the largest fintech festival in the Middle East. The event brought together a diverse group of participants and industry experts to discuss the latest trends and innovations in the financial technology sector.

news.headline: Activewear market expected to reach $746.3 billion by 2031 per Meticulous Research® report.
news.summary: A recent market research report revealed that the activewear market is estimated to experience significant growth globally up to the year 2031. The report, titled 'Activewear Market by End User (Men, Women, Kids), Sales Channel (In-store, Online), Material (Natural, Synthetic)', pointed out key factors contributing to this growth. It indicated a focus on various demographics including men, women, and kids, as well as different sales channels such as in-store and online platforms. The research projects a promising future for the market, highlighting an increase in demand for activewear made from both natural and synthetic materials. This forecast signifies a strong potential for expansion and development within the activewear industry on a global scale.

news.headline: Airwavz Solutions increased its credit facility with AB Private Credit Investors in Charlotte; a leading wireless infrastructure provider.
news.summary: On December 11, 2024, in Charlotte, North Carolina, Airwavz Solutions, Inc., a prominent provider of wireless infrastructure solutions, revealed the expansion of its current credit facility with AB Private Credit Investors. This successful upsizing signifies a significant move for the company in partnership with AB-PCI, the middle market direct lending platform.

news.headline: Disposable medical supplies market to grow by USD 604.17 billion from 2023–2028, with 17.3% CAGR driven by AI impact.
news.summary: In a recent report on the impact of AI on the market, it was revealed that the global disposable medical supplies market is projected to increase by a substantial USD 604.17 billion between 2024 and 2028. Research by Technavio suggests that the market will experience a notable growth rate, with a projected compound annual growth rate (CAGR) of 17.3% during this period.

news.headline: Global iron supplements market projected to reach USD 5.18 billion by 2028 from USD 4.15 billion in 2021, driven by rising health awareness.
news.summary: In Pune, India, as of December 11, 2024, the worldwide iron supplements market is anticipated to experience consistent growth due to rising health and nutrition awareness. Valued at USD 4,145.2 million in 2021, the market is expected to reach USD 5,184.7 million...

news.headline: Company buys back 10,000 of its own shares at $30 each, totaling $300,000 to boost shareholder value.
Global coding and marking equipment market to grow by $1.46 billion (2024-2028) at a CAGR of 6.89%, driven by product traceability and AI innovation - Technavio.
news.summary: A recent report utilizing AI forecasts the global coding and marking equipment market to experience significant growth, with an estimated increase of USD 1.46 billion projected between 2024 and 2028. Research by Technavio indicates a Compound Annual Growth Rate (CAGR) of nearly 6.89% during this period.

news.headline: Inventor from Montauk creates NURAVU glassware to aid reading menu; designed for small print. (LJD-427)
news.summary: A creator from Montauk, NY, shared the inspiration behind the invention of a new line of glassware for restaurants on Dec. 11, 2024. The innovator aimed to help patrons read small print on menus and introduced the NURAVU. This design is particularly useful for individuals struggling with vision impairment.

news.headline: Western Union opens 8 owned stores in Mexico, becoming first international money transfer service provider to do so.
news.summary: In Mexico City, Western Union has inaugurated eight company-owned locations, becoming the inaugural global money transfer provider to establish branded stores in the nation. These owned outlets cater to the increasing need for dependable and speedy cross-border money transfer services, offering a personalized and top-notch customer experience. This development signifies a significant step in meeting the surging demand for efficient international money transfer solutions in Mexico.

news.headline: Statsig names William da Cunha as new Chief Revenue Officer. Aims to accelerate growth, help developers build faster with one analytics platform.
news.summary: In Bellevue, Washington, a top platform for analytics and experimentation, Statsig, welcomed William da Cunha as the new Chief Revenue Officer (CRO). Da Cunha expressed enthusiasm for the chance to drive product development speed through swift data-backed decisions on a unified platform. At a crucial phase for Statsig, he aims to boost growth further.

news.headline: Positive CPI inflation report could lead to Fed rate cut.

Investments in First Nations cultural revitalization projects led to $91.2M GDP in Canada and 1,822 jobs in 2023-24, proving significant economic impact. CEO emphasized need for sustainable funding for continued success and better socioeconomic status for First Nations people, especially with high poverty rates in B.C. and low median incomes for First Nations. FPCC's contributions pivotal in B.C. and Canadian economy, generating $1.52 to Canada's GDP and $1.15 to B.C.'s GDP for every dollar revenue received. FPCC's work in language revitalization seen in Haíɫzaqv program, where funds led to job creation, growth, and more investment. New space opened on Nov. 7, 2024, reflecting program's success. FPCC's efforts align with reconciliation calls to action, contributing to cultural heritage preservation.
news.summary: The Conference Board of Canada's report on the economic impact of the First Peoples' Cultural Council (FPCC) in B.C. notes that the $48.6 million in grants delivered in 2023–24 generated an estimated $91.2 million in GDP for Canada. These investments created 1,822 full-year jobs and $142.3 million in economic output. CEO Tracey Herbert emphasized the importance of long-term funding for sustained economic benefits. FPCC's initiatives offer skilled job opportunities, particularly benefiting women in First Nations communities. The economic impact of FPCC was significant at both provincial and national levels, contributing $1.52 to Canada's GDP and $1.15 to B.C.'s GDP for every dollar received. The report highlights success stories, like the Haíɫzaqv program in Bella Bella, demonstrating how FPCC grants have led to tangible growth and inspired additional investment in cultural revitalization efforts. The FPCC's work aligns with reconciliation efforts in Canada, supporting language, arts, and cultural heritage revitalization among First Nations communities.

news.headline: Channel 12 Israel, citing an informed source: Estimates that we will succeed in concluding a new exchange deal by the time of Trump's inauguration - Al Jazeera.
CEO's murder renews spotlight on 'ghost guns.' #news #murder #guns
Nasdaq hits 20,000 with Apple and Broadcom climbing; S&P 500 rises after CPI data; Dow Jones flat.
news.summary: Today, the Dow Jones showed no significant change, while the S&P 500 experienced an increase following the release of CPI data. Nvidia's stock observed a rise, and Apple achieved record highs in the stock market. The Nasdaq surpassed 20,000 points as both Apple and Broadcom made gains. However, the Dow Jones was not as successful in today's trading session.

news.headline: Freedom Bank Foundation partners with LEDC as admin for NOVA Freedom Fund, enhancing support for underrepresented entrepreneurs.
news.summary: A banking foundation in Virginia is advancing its goal of helping underserved entrepreneurs access capital by establishing a new partnership. The Freedom Bank of Virginia revealed that its affiliated organization, the Freedom Bank Foundation, has recently finalized a formal agreement with Latino Economic, facilitating support for underrepresented business owners. This initiative, announced in Fairfax on December 11, 2024, aims to address the financial needs of marginalized entrepreneurs in the region. Through this collaboration, the Foundation intends to increase its impact by extending financial assistance and resources to assist entrepreneurs in achieving their business goals.

news.headline: Gildan Corporation celebrates listing on NYSE, rings bell. No numerical details provided.
news.summary: The New York Stock Exchange (NYSE) Group has shared that it does not advocate for or support specific investments, investment strategies, companies, products, or services.

news.headline: Germany abandons plan to expand gas power plants, significant step in energy transition.
Exxon Mobil aims to regain its leading position in the industry. #keyplayer #leadership
Microchip Technology revises Q4 revenue guidance downward, also announces manufacturing restructuring plans.
news.summary: Chandler, Arizona - On December 2, 2024, Microchip Technology Incorporated, a prominent supplier of smart, connected, and secure embedded control solutions, revised down its revenue forecast for the December 2024 quarter. In addition to this, the company unveiled plans for manufacturing restructuring.

news.headline: Tech mogul Elon Musk reaches a record $400B net worth, a milestone in history.
Dow Jones hits 45,000, S&P 500, Nasdaq at record closes; recent IPO stocks surge. Indices near all-time highs.
news.summary: Wednesday afternoon saw the major indexes hovering close to record highs. An IPO stock saw a breakout recently. The Dow Jones surpassed 45,000, while the S&P 500 and Nasdaq also achieved record closes. A significant seven name reached new peaks, showcasing a strong market performance.

news.headline: US stock markets hit record highs, US labor market sees recovery with 227,000 nonfarm payrolls in November. Bitcoin reaches $100,000.
news.summary: Last week saw a solid performance in the U.S. stock market as major indices like the S&P 500, Dow Jones, and Nasdaq 100 continued to reach new record highs. The technology and consumer discretionary sectors were the primary drivers of this growth, buoyed by leading tech companies like Apple Inc. (AAPL), Amazon.com Inc. (AMZN), and Meta Platforms Inc. (META) achieving all-time highs.In November, the U.S. labor market displayed strong signs of recovery with nonfarm payrolls increasing by 227,000, a notable jump from the upwardly revised 36,000 in October and surpassing the expected 220,000. The unemployment rate rose slightly to 4.2%, in line with expectations, while average hourly earnings slightly outperformed projections.The University of Michigan’s consumer sentiment index also reported highly positive results, showcasing a favorable overall... (for more details, visit Benzinga.com)

news.headline: Get ready for 2025 with a list of 50 top global stocks to watch.
